outlook_paragraph: Parsley Energy's operations show strong drilling momentum heading into Q4 2022, with 20 active sites detected via SAR, 8 of which are newly active—well above the trailing average. The relative activity delta of +4.2 indicates accelerating field development, supporting higher production volumes. With full exposure to the Permian segment and a realized price at a 7% discount to WTI, average benchmark prices near $64.42/boe anchor the revenue environment. The deterministic forecast of $761.5M reflects this robust activity level and stable pricing dynamics.
